prompt: Create a clean Japanese e-commerce advertisement image for a premium yoga mat in a bright minimalist home interior. The main scene shows 1 woman with her face softly blurred, doing an upward-facing dog yoga pose on a thick pastel pink yoga mat placed diagonally across a pale wood floor. She wears a white sports bra and light gray leggings, with her hair in a neat bun. In the left foreground, show 1 rolled purple yoga mat secured with 2 black straps. Along the bottom edge, display exactly 7 small rolled mat color variations in a row: pink, lavender, sky blue, mint green, beige, light gray, and black. Add large Japanese promotional typography on the left in a stylish modern layout: the headline reads "やさしく支える。" with "やさしく" in handwritten pink script and "支える。" in black, followed by a bold large line "極厚 10mm" with "10" oversized in pink and "mm" smaller in pink italic style. Under that, add a pink rectangular banner with white text reading "滑りにくい / TPE素材". Beneath the banner, place exactly 3 circular feature icons with labels in Japanese: 1) a non-slip texture icon labeled "滑り止め", 2) a cushioning icon with downward arrows labeled "クッション性", 3) a feather icon labeled "軽量". In the upper right corner, add a gold laurel award badge with a crown and layered red ribbons, containing the Japanese text "Yahoo! JAPAN ショッピング RANKING 第1位 ヨガマット部門". In the lower right corner, add a pink angled label reading "選べる 7色" with the number 7 large and white. The background should be soft, airy, and high-key with a white wall, natural daylight, and a slightly out-of-focus potted green plant and woven basket on the right side. Use a polished commercial product-photography style, soft shadows, pastel color palette, luxury wellness branding, sharp layout, and realistic materials, suitable for an online marketplace hero image.
